topics: Design a database schema for an application with ER diagram from a problem description
Creation of database schema - DDL (create tables, set constraints, enforce relationships, create indices, delete and modify tables) and export ER diagram from the database and verify relationships
Database initialization - Data insert and data import to a database (bulk import using UI and SQL Commands)
Practice SQL commands for DML (insertion, updating, altering, deletion of data, and viewing/querying records based on condition in databases)
Implementation of various aggregate functions, Order By, Group By & Having clause in SQL
Implementation of set operators, nested queries, and join queries
Practice of SQL TCL and DCL commands (Rollback, Commit, Savepoint) and DCL commands for granting and revoking user privileges
Practice of SQL commands for creation of views and assertions
Creation of Procedures, Triggers, and Functions
Design a database application using any front-end tool for any problem selected
Use MongoDB/Cassandra to create NoSQL Databases (domain can be eCommerce, Inventory, Social Media)
